title: Verify existing rate limiting middleware implementation
description: Verify that the rate-limiting middleware in src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts (sliding-window algorithm using an in-memory Map, IP-based key resolution, whitelist/blacklist support, rate-limit headers) is fully implemented and correct. The task description referenced rateLimit.ts but the actual file is rate-limiter.ts. Confirm the existing implementation satisfies the requirements and that rate-limiter.test.ts provides comprehensive unit test coverage.

existing_patterns.description: Middleware chain pattern using NextRequest/NextResponse with factory function createRequestLogger returning middleware and logging helpers

SlidingWindowRateLimiter class with in-memory Map store, configurable maxRequests/windowMs, cleanup interval, reset/destroy methods; createRateLimiterMiddleware factory with keyResolver, ipWhitelist, ipBlacklist options; byIp() and byApiKey() key resolvers

Co-located vitest test file with vi.useFakeTimers, comprehensive describe blocks for core logic, middleware integration, IP whitelist/blacklist, concurrent requests, window expiry, and header validation
